location.name: Art appraisers in Portland, Oregon
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Portland, Oregon.

listedAppraisers.name: Alicia E Weaver
listedAppraisers.description: Alicia E Weaver provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Fine art (19th–20th century), Americana, Decorative arts, Furniture. With Since 2012 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European Art, American Art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th-century works. With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Baggenstoss Appraisal
listedAppraisers.description: Baggenstoss Appraisal is a professional antique & personal property appraiser in Portland, Oregon. Specializing in antique furniture, collectibles, and decorative art by an accredited member of the International Society of Appraisers.

listedAppraisers.name: Dobesh Appraisal - Jerry L. Dobesh ASA
listedAppraisers.description: Jerry L. Dobesh, ASA, is a Portland, Oregon, based antiques appraiser who specializes in appraisals of antiques, decorative & fine art, personal property for estate and trust, insurance, and donation purposes.

listedAppraisers.name: Escher Associates
listedAppraisers.description: Escher Associates provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Paintings, Sculpture, Photography, Rare books. With 1984 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Gary Germer & Associates
listedAppraisers.description: Gary Germer & Associates is a premier Portland-based firm specializing in white-glove concierge estate brokerage, asset liquidation, and personal property appraisals. Founder Gary Germer brings over 30 years of antiques sector experience, with formal training in art history.

listedAppraisers.name: Gurr Johns
listedAppraisers.description: Gurr Johns provides professional art appraisal services specializing in High-value appraisals, Expert witness services. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Jennifer L. Stoots, AAA
listedAppraisers.description: Jennifer L. Stoots, AAA offers fine art appraisal services serving Portland, OR. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.name: Mimesis Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Mimesis Gallery provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Free valuations, Consignment-based sales. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
